parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'causal_extraction', target: null, status: 'skipped', note: 'causal_extraction: ' + ($json.reason || 'no-op') }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'default', temperature: 0.1, max_tokens: 1800, response_format: { type: 'json_object' }, messages: [ { role: 'system', content: 'You extract macro causal chains from finance headlines. Output STRICT JSON: { "themes": [ { "theme": string<=80, "mechanism": string<=180, "summary": string<=280, "entities": string[]<=10, "sectors": string[]<=6, "symbols": string[]<=12, "evidence_ids": (string|number)[]<=8, "confidence": number_in_[0,1] } ] }. ONLY use symbols from the supplied universe. Group several related headlines into ONE theme (deduplicate). Skip noise (PR fluff, opinion). At most 6 themes per call. Mechanism = short causal sentence ("event X drives demand for Y in sector Z"). Confidence reflects evidence strength + agreement across sources. Do NOT include markdown or commentary outside the JSON object.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Universe (you may only reference these symbols): ' + JSON.stringify($json.universe) + '\nRecent headlines (urgency≥2, last 6h): ' + JSON.stringify($json.brief_items) + '\nReturn ONLY the JSON object with the themes array now.' } ] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'causal_extraction', target: ($('Verifier (relations)').item.json && $('Verifier (relations)').item.json.theme) || null, status: 'ok', note: 'causal_extraction: stored' }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ workflow: 'causal_extraction', target: null, status: 'error', note: 'causal_extraction: ' + ($json.reason || 'rejected') }) }}
